title: United Kingdom Photocard Driving Licence Renewal
description: Renew a 10-year full or provisional photocard driving licence for a resident of Great Britain (a different service applies in Northern Ireland) through DVLA's 'Renew your driving licence' service, which offers three channels: an online service, a Post Office visit, or a postal 'D1 pack'. This document describes the channel choice, the online photo-reuse/upload step, and each channel's payment method, including the name-or-title-change rule that forces the postal channel. It does not submit the renewal; the live gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the GOV.UK 'Renew your driving licence' and 'Change the photo on your driving licence' answer pages (fetched via the GOV.UK Content API, api/content/renew-driving-licence and api/content/renew-photo-driving-licence), plus a direct, unauthenticated crawl of the online service's own pre-login screens at apply-for-driving-licence.service.gov.uk (before-you-start, before-you-continue). Like gb/dvla/vehicle-tax and gb/hmpo/passport-application-first-adult, the authenticated online service has no published field-by-field specification beyond its first screens, so this document is transcribed from GOV.UK guidance prose plus the observable pre-login screens rather than a full screen-by-screen review. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: licenceType
fields.label: Which licence are you renewing?
fields.description: full = a full driving licence; provisional = a provisional driving licence. Both renew through the same DVLA service; a first-ever provisional (never previously held one, or last applied before 1 March 1973) is a separate application, not a renewal.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — page title

fields.name: nameOrTitleChangedSinceLicence
fields.label: Has your name or title changed since you got your current licence?
fields.description: If true, the applicant cannot renew online or at a Post Office and must use applicationChannel = post, including identity documents evidencing the change. This document does not model the specific identity-evidence requirements for a name/title change (see gov.uk/id-for-driving-licence); that is out of scope for this version.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Before you start / If your name or title has changed

fields.name: applicationChannel
fields.label: How are you renewing?
fields.description: online = DVLA's online service; post_office = take a reminder letter or photocard to a Post Office that deals with DVLA photocard renewal; post = send a completed 'D1 pack' of forms to DVLA by post. post_office and online are unavailable when nameOrTitleChangedSinceLicence is true.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Before you start / Apply at a Post Office / Apply by post

fields.name: photoSource
fields.label: Where should your new photo come from?
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is online. reuse_valid_uk_passport_photo = DVLA may reuse the photo from the applicant's valid UK passport; upload_new_photo = the applicant uploads a new photo taken during the online session (the guidance recommends a mobile device with a camera).
fields.sourceRef: Change the photo on your driving licence — You'll be able to use your passport photo or upload a new one; apply-for-driving-licence.service.gov.uk before-you-continue screen

fields.name: photoFile
fields.label: New photo
fields.description: Required when photoSource is upload_new_photo. A digital photo uploaded during the online renewal session.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is online. DVLA sends a confirmation email once the online renewal is submitted.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Personal data

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.label: How are you paying?
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is online and feeExemptionReason is not set (the online fee is £14). Accepted cards only; no fee is charged when feeExemptionReason is set.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — How much it costs

fields.name: hasReminderLetter
fields.label: Do you have your DVLA reminder letter?
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is post_office. If false, the applicant's current photocard licence must be presented instead (currentPhotocardPresented).
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Apply at a Post Office

fields.name: currentPhotocardPresented
fields.label: Current photocard licence presented
fields.description: Required (and must be true) when applicationChannel is post_office and hasReminderLetter is false; optional supporting document when hasReminderLetter is true.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Apply at a Post Office

fields.name: printedPassportTypePhoto
fields.label: Recent printed passport-type photo
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is post. A recently printed passport-type photo; the back of the photo must not be signed.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Apply by post

fields.name: currentPhotocardIncluded
fields.label: Current photocard licence included
fields.description: Optional when applicationChannel is post: include the current photocard licence with the D1 pack if the applicant still has it.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Apply by post

fields.name: paymentInstrument
fields.label: How are you paying by post?
fields.description: Required when applicationChannel is post and feeExemptionReason is not set (the postal fee is £17, payable to DVLA).
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Apply by post

fields.name: feeExemptionReason
fields.label: Fee exemption
fields.description: When set, no fee is charged on any channel and paymentMethod/paymentInstrument do not apply. over_70 = the applicant is aged 70 or over; medical_short_period_licence = the applicant holds a medical short-period licence.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — How much it costs / Apply at a Post Office / Apply by post

fields.name: researchContactOptIn
fields.label: Contact me about research
fields.description: Optional. Applies to the online channel: DVLA may email the applicant to ask them to take part in research; the applicant can opt out.
fields.sourceRef: Renew your driving licence — Personal data
